stages.prompt: One business I want to start is ___.
One reason I want to be an entrepreneur is ___.
One skill I need to develop for business is ___.
One challenge I might face as an entrepreneur is ___.
One way I'll prepare to start my business is ___.

result.winMessage: You completed {{score}} out of {{total}} entries! Great job reflecting on your entrepreneurial dreams!
result.lesson: Lesson: Reflecting on your business goals helps you prepare for the entrepreneurial journey!
result.loseMessage: You completed {{score}} out of {{total}} entries. Remember, preparing well is the first step to starting a successful business!
result.tip: Tip: Think about what you're passionate about, and how you can turn that into an entrepreneurial dream!
